patch.value: Extract calendar UX into installable pm package
Move calendar/cal presentation, reminders/events rendering, recurrence expansion, and schedule presets toward a pm-calendar package while keeping deadline metadata and item primitives in core.

pm-calendar package owns optional calendar UX; core keeps item deadline fields; contracts/MCP expose calendar commands only when package installed or during compatibility fallback; temp-project dogfood covers installed package behavior.

message: Close: calendar package extraction and package-first verification passed

patch.value: Extracted calendar presentation commands into the TypeScript-authored pm-calendar package and tightened static SDK contracts around package-owned actions.

pm-calendar installs as a first-party package, calendar/cal run through dynamic package handlers, static SDK actions exclude package-owned calendar/templates actions, and packed CLI smoke proves install/run/upgrade paths.

Focused tests, isolated dogfood, packed npx smoke, full coverage, required telemetry release gates, Sentry, and telemetry checks passed; validation has only the known pre-existing history drift warnings.
